Video.summary: Velvet Revolver drummer Matt Sorum's French bulldog goes crazy at the sight of other dogs; Cesar helps a former therapy dog with aggression issues.
Video.title: Heavy Metal Miles

Video.summary: Three canines with issues at a dog-friendly ad agency office; a border collie mix becomes excited and unresponsive to commands when in her owner's truck.
Video.title: Mad Dogs

Video.summary: A professional dog groomer reaches out to Cesar for help with three of her toughest clients; Cesar helps a couple with their head-strong pitbull.
Video.title: Have Dog...Will Travel

Video.summary: Cesar Millan helps Suzie Dove Miles, who has recently adopted a Doberman who is fearful of literally everything.
Video.title: Afraid of the Bark

Video.summary: Cesar attempts to introduce Roscoe, an agoraphobic Akita who is too scared to leave the house and garden and has never been for a walk, to the outside world.
Video.title: Run Home Roscoe!

Video.summary: Cesar teams up with horse whisperer Pat Parelli to improve the behavior of the dogs and horses at a riding center; a schnauzer/poodle mix with separation anxiety and dog aggression.
Video.title: Cesar and the Horse Whisperer

Video.summary: Cesar Millan investigates the case of a bulldog named Bella who has become aggressive ever since her owner's five-month rehab stint.
Video.title: Bulldog on the Edge

Video.summary: A Doberman/Lab and a pit bull develop behavioral issues after not being walked for months; an Italian greyhound acts aggressively toward the men of the house.
Video.title: Tale of Two Cesars

Video.summary: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.
Video.title: The Escape Artist

Video.summary: Daschund Lotus is very territorial; his aggression sends his owner Chari to the hospital; Cesar makes a house call to see Joey, a German Shepard who is territorial over the second story of his owner's home.
Video.title: Turf Wars

Video.summary: Cesar helps a man get over a fear of dogs so he can finally fulfill his children's request to adopt one of their own.
Video.title: Fear of Dogs

Video.summary: A Weimaraner eats everything in sight; a yellow Lab's excess energy is expressed destructively; an Australian shepherd is unable to socialize with other dogs.
Video.title: Revved-Up Harley

Video.summary: Cesar helps actor and comedian Kathy Griffin with her two rescue dogs, Chance and Pom Pom, who are disobedient and territorial.
Video.title: My Life on the Dog List

Image.alt: My Life on the Dog List
My Life on the Dog List
My Life on the Dog List
My Life on the Dog List
My Life on the Dog List
My Life on the Dog List

Video.summary: Two troubled dogs, and their families, win sessions with Cesar after auditioning at a pet store in Orange County, Calif.
Video.title: Canine 9-1-1, Part 1

Video.summary: Dave Glassman adopts pit bulls Blackjack and Memphis together, but one day during a barking fit, the two dogs turn on each other.
Video.title: Dueling Pit Bulls

Video.summary: Cesar works to dial down the bad behaviors of four problem dogs who won sessions at the PETCO auditions.
Video.title: Canine 9-1-1, Part 2

Video.summary: Puppy mills produce millions of dogs; Ceaser works with an animal rights group to rescue and rehabilitate some pups.
Video.title: Inside Puppy Mills

Video.summary: A pit bull is aggressive toward people and dogs; a dachshund mix exhibits aggression at feeding time and when it comes time to trim his nails.
Video.title: Bad Blood

Video.summary: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.
Video.title: Whipped & Wild

Video.summary: Cesar celebrates the show's 100th episode with a grand reunion of many of the past guests and their dogs.
Video.title: 100th Episode Celebration

Video.summary: A border collie is overprotective of his owner; a German shepherd is aggressive toward other dogs and people.
Video.title: Collie Crisis

Video.summary: Old and new cases that show the process for adopting a dog, introducing one to the home, setting rules and boundaries and dealing with the loss of a pet.
Video.title: A Member of the Family

Video.summary: Cesar helps the owner of a grooming business deal with difficult canine clients; a Chihuahua has a barking problem.
Video.title: Bad Hair Day

Video.summary: Family dogs brawl with each other; a dog torments a child; a five-legged miniature pinscher has an aggressive attitude.
Video.title: Saving Ryan
